subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1913-05-06
subcodes.first_line: I do not feel happy in Paris. I do not know whether it is its depressing atmosphere or the effect of the indifference of the people to spiritual things.
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Western values; culture, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
